scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend-admin run build && npm --prefix frontend-mobile run build
scripts.verify:delivery: npm run check-encoding && npm test && npm run build
scripts.verify:quality-traceability: npm run check-encoding && node --test tests/quality-traceability-delivery.test.mjs tests/quality-board.test.mjs tests/mobile-qc-record.test.mjs tests/injection-traceability.test.mjs && npm run build
